title: Branded Click Classification — Phase 20.7
update: KPI logic updated to distinguish branded homepage click from organic content conversion.

first_click_status.FIRST_CLICK_28D: ACHIEVED — 1 click on homepage in 28-day window (May 15 - Jun 11)
first_click_status.FIRST_CONTENT_CLICK: NOT_ACHIEVED — no click on any calculator, blog, guide, or decision page
first_click_status.FIRST_NON_BRANDED_CLICK: NOT_ACHIEVED — the only click is on homepage at position 1.9, characteristic of branded 'qfinhub' search

homepage_click_detail.nature: BRANDED_NAVIGATIONAL — someone searched 'qfinhub' and clicked the homepage. NOT a content conversion from an informational search.

rules.first_content_click_requires: Click on calculator, blog, guide, decision, or tool page from non-branded search query
rules.branded_click_tracking: Track separately as brand awareness signal, not content success metric
rules.official_status: FIRST_CLICK_28D = achieved (factual). FIRST_CONTENT_CLICK = not achieved (quality distinction).
